name: Shiina
description:
A male sekirei (one of the few seen in the series) his powers are extremely dangerous and powerful. He can instantly disintegrate most forms of material including metal, wood, fabric and flesh to a limited degree. His Norito to remove the opponent's Sekirei crest is "By the corpses of my contract completely rot my Ashikabi's cross!"

From Sekirei
creator: Azure Fire97
